_description: Comprehensive HR system demonstrating entity modeling, relators, computations, events, and intelligence artifacts. Tracks 520 employees across 20 departments, 12 international locations, with skills, training, salary, performance, vacation, sentiment, and team data.

description.en: Employee employment status enumeration
Employment contract type enumeration
Salary payment frequency scope (yearly, monthly)
Career and performance event type enumeration
Performance review rating enumeration
Skill proficiency level enumeration
Training program status enumeration
Employee sentiment survey rating enumeration

Priority level for hiring requisitions

A request to hire for a position, subject to normative process approval
Manages a department; can request hiring requisitions and approve budget allocations
Validates hiring requisitions for compliance, headcount, and policy alignment
Executes recruitment process: sources candidates, conducts screening, fills approved positions
3-stage hiring requisition approval process: HR Validation (HR Admin), Management Approval (Dept Manager), Recruitment (Recruiter)
HR Administrator validates requisition for compliance, headcount, and policy alignment
Department Manager reviews and approves budget allocation for hiring
Recruiter sources candidates, conducts screening, and fills approved positions
Obligation for the HR Administrator to validate requisition compliance
Obligation for the Department Manager to approve budget allocation
Obligation for the Recruiter to source and fill approved positions
Hiring requisition targets a specific department
Hiring requisition targets a specific career level
Hiring requisition targets a specific office location
Employee who submitted the hiring requisition
Date of hire (ISO 8601)

Numeric rank 1-8 for ordering
Contract start date
Contract end date (null for permanent)
Computed: base_salary + bonus
Computed: days_allocated - days_used
eNPS score 0-10
Computed: Promoter (9-10), Passive (7-8), Detractor (0-6)
Unique requisition identifier
Title of the position to fill

Event emitted when a new employee is hired
Event emitted when an employee is promoted
Event emitted when an employee is terminated
Event emitted when department termination count exceeds threshold
Event emitted when department average eNPS score drops below threshold
Event emitted when a hiring requisition completes the approval process
Event emitted when a hiring requisition is rejected at any approval stage
Event emitted when a recruiter confirms a position has been filled
Event emitted when an employee's salary percentile score falls below the P25 threshold
Computes total_compensation = base_salary + bonus on salary records

computations.formula: let base = base_salary.value; let b = bonus.value; base + b

description.en: Computes remaining = days_allocated - days_used on vacation records

computations.formula: let a = allocated.value; let u = used.value; a - u

description.en: Classifies sentiment score: 9-10=Promoter, 7-8=Passive, 0-6=Detractor

computations.formula: let s = score.value; if s >= 9.0 { 2.0 } else if s >= 7.0 { 1.0 } else { 0.0 }

description.en: Publishes notification when performance event type changes

artifact_definitions._comment: === ARTIFACT 1: Headcount by Department and Location ===
artifact_definitions.name: Headcount by Department and Location

description.en: Employee headcount aggregated by department and office location

artifact_definitions._comment: === ARTIFACT 2: Salary by Department and Level ===
artifact_definitions.name: Salary by Department and Level

description.en: Salary aggregation by department and career level via employee relator paths
Skill distribution by department, navigating employee -> department and employee -> skill

artifact_definitions._comment: === ARTIFACT 4: eNPS by Department and Location (with threshold) ===
artifact_definitions.name: eNPS by Department and Location

description.en: Employee net promoter score aggregated by department and location with low-eNPS threshold
Vacation allocation and usage aggregated by department
Performance event counts by department with high-turnover threshold on termination count
Employee salary percentile rank compared against the department/level cohort from the salary artifact
Employee sentiment percentile rank compared against the department/location cohort from the eNPS artifact
Composite readiness score combining salary percentile (40%) and sentiment percentile (60%) via weighted average
Composite risk score using the minimum of salary and sentiment percentiles — low in either signals high risk
Comprehensive HR analytics application with employee management, performance tracking, skill-gap analysis, sentiment monitoring, and intelligence artifacts
Core HR operations: employees, departments, contracts, salary management
Skills, training, performance reviews, and career development tracking
Intelligence artifacts, sentiment analysis, and workforce analytics
Normative processes: hiring requisition approval and recruitment workflows
